description: Case style: Stainless steel circular case Dial style: White dial, rose gold colour markings and rose gold colour hands with white accents, black minute and seconds markings around the dial, branding near the 12 and 6 hour mark, date display near the 3 hour mark Strap style: Genuine leather strap with a tang closure Features: Analog watch, screw to reset time Water resistance: Up to 30 m Warranty: One year from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
